name: zillow-skills
description: Agent skills for U.S. property data via Zillapi.com
author: Zillapi

skills.name: zillow-full
skills.description: Complete Zillow property data toolkit — address/URL lookup, Zestimate, search, price history, photos, schools, agent.

skills.name: zillow-zestimate
skills.description: Zillow Zestimate (property valuation and rent Zestimate) lookups by address or zpid.

skills.name: zillow-search
skills.description: Search U.S. property listings by location or bounding box, price, beds, baths, and home type.
